headline: Stryker Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) executives said the company’s first quarter results were meaningfully disrupted by a late-quarter cyber incident that temporarily halted production and delayed shipments and revenue recognition, but management maintained its full-year outlook as operations returned to normal in ea
